description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The property is enclosed by a low wall and features a driveway leading to a covered carport, as well as a landscaped front yard with greenery and outdoor seating. The house has large windows, providing ample natural light and a connection to the outdoor spaces. The rear section includes a private garden area, and the overall layout is rectangular with clean, straight lines. The exterior materials appear to be a combination of concrete, glass, and metal, with a focus on functionality and simplicity. The house is situated adjacent to a paved road, making it easily accessible in an urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard enclosed by a low wall. Features include a driveway, carport, and minimalist design with concrete, glass, and metal materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, main entrance, and landscaped front yard with outdoor seating.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the carport, and the boundary wall with greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private garden area and the back of the house, with the flat roof and boundary wall visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway entrance from the road, the carport, and the side garden area.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows with asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door under a flat overhang, with a paved approach and no decorative columns or steps.
